subject: Question about GPU selection for processing K3 images
body:
Hi all,

We are currently facing a GPU memory issue starting processing K3 images. 
Our old workstation has 4 2080Ti, but is unable to process super-res K3 
images. We are currently looking for a new workstation with RTX3090, A6000 
or Quadro 6000/8000. I went through the conversations, it seems not many 
people are using A6000 or Quadro cards. I just wondering if these cards are 
compatible with Warp. And do we have an exact GPU memory estimation for 
processing super-res K3 images (11520x8184)?

Also, due to the thermal issue with RTX3090 and stockout of RTX and Quadro 
cards, is it possible to SLI two 2080Ti cards with NVLink in order to 
double the memory. Will Warp works with this setup?

Please let me know if you any thought! Thanks a lot!

Best,
Zhaoqian Wang
